ddls:
CREATE TABLE "genes" (
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each gene (e.g., FBgn0263289) */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene (e.g., scrib) */,
  "gene_type" TEXT /* Type of the gene (e.g., Seed_Negative, Seed_Positive) */,
  "gene_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the gene */,
  "gene_symbol" TEXT /* Gene symbol (e.g., scrib) */,
  "gene_chromosome" INTEGER /* Chromosome number where the gene is located */,
  "gene_start_position" INTEGER /* Start position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  "gene_end_position" INTEGER /* End position of the gene on the chromosome */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the gene type */,
  "type_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the gene type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissues" (
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tissue */,
  "tissue_name" TEXT /* Name of the tissue */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the tissue */,
  "tissue_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the tissue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_expressions" (
  "expression_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each gene expression */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being expressed */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue where the gene is expressed */,
  "expression_value" REAL /* Value of the gene expression */,
  "expression_version" TEXT /* Version of the gene expression data */,
  "expression_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene expression data was recorded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expression_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_expressions_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "signaling_pathways" (
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each signaling pathway */,
  "pathway_name" TEXT /* Name of the signaling pathway */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the signaling pathway */,
  "pathway_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the signaling pathway */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_pathway_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene involved in the interaction */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signaling pathway involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_interactions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_pathway_interactions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_overlaps" (
  "overlap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each overlap */,
  "gene_id1" TEXT /* ID of the first gene involved in the overlap */,
  "gene_id2" TEXT /* ID of the second gene involved in the overlap */,
  "overlap_value" INTEGER /* Value of the overlap */,
  "overlap_type" TEXT /* Type of overlap (e.g., co-expression, co-regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("overlap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_overlaps_gene_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id2") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_overlaps_gene_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id1") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the user role */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the gene */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the gene was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_method" TEXT /* Method used to access the genetic data (e.g., web interface, API) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "pathway_id1" INTEGER /* ID of the first signaling pathway involved in the interaction */,
  "pathway_id2" INTEGER /* ID of the second signaling pathway involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_interactions_pathway_id2 FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id2") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_interactions_pathway_id1 FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id1") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signaling pathway being regulated */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_regulations_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene being regulated */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_regulations_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tissue_regulations" (
  "regulation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each regulation */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue being regulated */,
  "regulation_type" TEXT /* Type of regulation (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("regulation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tissue_regulations_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_gene_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signaling pathway involved in the interaction */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_gene_interactions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_gene_interactions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "gene_tissue_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* ID of the gene involved in the interaction */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., expression, regulation) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_tissue_interactions_gene_id FOREIGN KEY ("gene_id") REFERENCES genes ("gene_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_gene_tissue_interactions_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pathway_tissue_interactions" (
  "interaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interaction */,
  "pathway_id" INTEGER /* ID of the signaling pathway involved in the interaction */,
  "tissue_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tissue involved in the interaction */,
  "interaction_type" TEXT /* Type of interaction (e.g., activation, inhibition) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_tissue_interactions_tissue_id FOREIGN KEY ("tissue_id") REFERENCES tissues ("tissue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_pathway_tissue_interactions_pathway_id FOREIGN KEY ("pathway_id") REFERENCES signaling_pathways ("pathway_id")
)
